abstract: Terminates a connection with the daemon and frees memory associated with the DNSServiceRef.
overview:
## Discussion

Any services or records registered with this DNSServiceRef will be deregistered. Any Browse, Resolve, or Query operations called with this reference will be terminated.

Note: If the reference’s underlying socket is used in a run loop or select() call, it should be removed BEFORE [doc://com.apple.dnssd/documentation/dnssd/DNSServiceRefDeallocate(_:)] is called, as this function closes the reference’s socket.

Note: If the reference was initialized with [doc://com.apple.dnssd/documentation/dnssd/DNSServiceCreateConnection(_:)], any DNSRecordRefs created via this reference will be invalidated by this call - the resource records are deregistered, and their DNSRecordRefs may not be used in subsequent functions. Similarly, if the reference was initialized with [doc://com.apple.dnssd/documentation/dnssd/DNSServiceRegister(_:_:_:_:_:_:_:_:_:_:_:_:)], and an extra resource record was added to the service via [doc://com.apple.dnssd/documentation/dnssd/DNSServiceAddRecord(_:_:_:_:_:_:_:)], the DNSRecordRef created by the add call is invalidated when this function is called - the DNSRecordRef may not be used in subsequent functions.

Note: This call is to be used only with the DNSServiceRef defined by this API.

# DNSServiceRefDeallocate(_:)

**Function**

Terminates a connection with the daemon and frees memory associated with the DNSServiceRef.

## Declaration

```swift
func DNSServiceRefDeallocate(_ sdRef: DNSServiceRef!)
```

## Parameters

- **sdRef**: A DNSServiceRef initialized by any of the DNSService calls.

## Discussion

Any services or records registered with this DNSServiceRef will be deregistered. Any Browse, Resolve, or Query operations called with this reference will be terminated.

Note: If the reference’s underlying socket is used in a run loop or select() call, it should be removed BEFORE [doc://com.apple.dnssd/documentation/dnssd/DNSServiceRefDeallocate(_:)] is called, as this function closes the reference’s socket.

Note: If the reference was initialized with [doc://com.apple.dnssd/documentation/dnssd/DNSServiceCreateConnection(_:)], any DNSRecordRefs created via this reference will be invalidated by this call - the resource records are deregistered, and their DNSRecordRefs may not be used in subsequent functions. Similarly, if the reference was initialized with [doc://com.apple.dnssd/documentation/dnssd/DNSServiceRegister(_:_:_:_:_:_:_:_:_:_:_:_:)], and an extra resource record was added to the service via [doc://com.apple.dnssd/documentation/dnssd/DNSServiceAddRecord(_:_:_:_:_:_:_:)], the DNSRecordRef created by the add call is invalidated when this function is called - the DNSRecordRef may not be used in subsequent functions.

Note: This call is to be used only with the DNSServiceRef defined by this API.

## Unix Domain Socket access, DNSServiceRef deallocation, and data processing functions

- **DNSServiceProcessResult(_:)**: Reads a reply from the daemon, calling the appropriate application callback.
- **DNSServiceRefSockFD(_:)**: Accesses underlying Unix domain socket for an initialized DNSServiceRef.
